name: §6Subzero Wisp
description:
§8Gabagool Pet, feed to gain XP

§7Health: §c[Health]
§7Damage: §c[Damage]
§7True Defense: §f[True Defense]
§7Intelligence: §a[Intelligence]

§6Icehammer
§7Lets you break fire pillars, which
§7heals you for §c50% §7of your max §c❤
§7over §a3s§7.

§6Bulwark
§7Kill Blazes to gain defense against
§7them and demons.
§7Bonus: §a+0❈ §7& §f+0❂
§7Next Upgrade: §a+30❈ §7& §f+3❂ §8(§a0§7/§c100§8)

§6Blaze Slayer
§7Gain §b?x §7Combat XP against §aBlazes§7.

§6Extinguish
§7While in combat on the Crimson Isle,
§7spawn a pool every §a8s§7.
§7Bathing in it heals §c25%❤ §7now and
§c10%❤§7/s for §a8s§7.

§6Ephemeral Stability
§7Regenerate mana §b40% §7faster

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Ice Fairy Subzero Wisp Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can be applied to Subzero
§7Wisp, Droplet Wisp, Frost Wisp, and
§7Glacial Wisp pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
